stemHtml:
An autothrust system can either maintain a specific engine thrust value or it can vary engine thrust. When would autothrust maintain a specific thrust value?

1. Optimum performance when climbing or descending to a new flight level
2. Climbing or descending to a new flight level with reduced performance
3. Take-off
4. Go around
5. Cruise
6. Descending on a glideslope during an approach
